# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: web
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-admin
  namespace: web
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: api
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-grpc
  namespace: api
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9000
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-postgres
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-redis
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-public-access
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    networks:
      - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
      - cidr: ::/0
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-admin-restricted
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-operator
          namespace: ops
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-from-frontend
  namespace: api
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-grpc-from-internal
  namespace: api
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: web
        - name: mobile-backend
          namespace: mobile
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-gateway
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
---

  name: order-service-from-gateway
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api
---

metadata:
  name: payment-service-from-order
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-order-and-gateway
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-from-all-services
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: postgres-from-services
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: database-postgres
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: redis-from-all-services
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-redis
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-prometheus
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: prometheus
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scrape
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-prometheus
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: grafana
          namespace: monitoring
        - name: prometheus-operator
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-grpc
  namespace: security
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 9003
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-from-gateway-and-frontend
  namespace: security
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api
        - name: frontend
          namespace: web
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-service-http
  namespace: security
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-from-critical-services
  namespace: security
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: security
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: webhook-service-http
  namespace: integrations
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webhook-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: webhook-from-event-services
  namespace: integrations
spec:
  server:
    name: webhook-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: services
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: services
